title: Official Cobblemon Advanced Plus
description: Cobblemon Advanced adds alot of RPG and Adventure Aspects to the Already Cobblemon Expierience
body:
# **Cobblemon Advanced Plus Modpack**

Your Ultimate Cobblemon Experience Awaits!
Embark on an unforgettable journey into a world where creativity meets adventure. Cobblemon Adventures is the perfect blend of performance, stunning visuals, and engaging gameplay designed for both seasoned players and newcomers alike.

**RESOURCE PACKS MUST BE ENABLED FOR THE DATAPACKS THAT ARE INCLUDED**

## **NOW CONTAINS THE PHYSICS MOD**

**A new immersive experience**

Dive into a new world like never seen before. Collapsing caves, interactive ragdolls, item physics and much more awaits you! ⠀ ⠀

**Supported Platforms**

Windows, Linux and MacOS (M1/M2 CPUs only work with Minecraft 1.20 and above, the other versions need compatibility mode: Tutorial)! ⠀ ⠀

**Mobs**

The favourite part of every physics maniac. Each Vanilla Minecraft mob supports ragdolls, fracturing and a blocky version!

![Pigimage1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41ac800c95bd35c83b2ee1bdea37efd0352dc38f_0.webp) 
![PigImage2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/55f613b8f702b37cff4132ea57be8bef234ccd52_0.webp)
![PigImage3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b04213d093cb7a32731245a8a5eebf3bcefe8db8_0.webp)

**Blocks**

Let the blocks in the Minecraft world crumble into pieces!

![Stoneimage1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f90120c8aeeb48c236a3862facd12a091b36a4e6_0.webp)
![Stoneimage2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63b8d3160851b4d5b1083e93c1b3313c0a1b823f_0.webp)
![Stoneimage3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b0e1d2b27adad9c0051f8ac7065d236ff68639e_0.webp)
![Stoneimage4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11cd7f66e15a39cf1d67ae1341c2b1acac7fe3a2_0.webp)

**Other features**

Are you bored of floating items? Try item physics! Gravity? Moon? Mars? Pluto? Earth? Change it to whatever you want! Do you want to bring your PC to its limit? See how long it will last with collapsing structures!

![OtherStuff1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ceb3cc9e3e80fee8acd3935d8507ce841948078_0.webp)
![OtherStuff2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6507bd39d567b4287d4bc14dc42d92df8162e4e2_0.webp)
![OtherStuff3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0ee32a9b792f6cd07b53c586552cd6d6c6bb460_0.webp)





  **✨Features**

  Cobblemon Integration
  Dive into a world brimming with unique creatures to catch, train, and battle.
  Build your dream team and explore their diverse biomes and habitats.
  Enhanced Performance
  
  **🍃Enjoy smooth gameplay with performance mods**
  
    Sodium
 
    Lithium
  
    FerriteCore
  
    Experience stunning, optimized lighting with Starlight.
  
    Dynamic Visuals

**🖌️Transform your world into a vibrant masterpiece with**

    Iris Shaders
  
    Motschen’s Better Leaves
  
    LambDynamicLights
  
    User-Friendly Enhancements

**🛠️Streamline crafting, enchanting, and management**

    Roughly Enough Items (REI)

    Enchantment Descriptions

    Tool Stats

**🗺️Exploration & Navigation**

    Xaero’s World Map

    Xaero’s Minimap

    Immerse yourself in the sounds of adventure with Presence Footsteps and Drip Sounds.

    Immersive Building

    TecTonic

    TerraLith

    Traveler's Backpack

    Traveler's Titles

**🛖Elevate creativity with tools for landscapes and interiors**

    Crafting Tweaks

    Continuity

    Wavey Capes

    Streamlined Multiplayer

    Macaws Windows

    Macaws Roofs

    Better Furnaces Reforged

    Iron Chests: Restocked

**🛜Multiplayer has never been smoother, thanks to**

    Better Ping Display

    Dynamic FPS

**🌟Why Choose Cobblemon Adventures?**
    Cobblemon Adventures offers:

A balanced blend of performance, visuals, and depth.
Endless opportunities for exploration, competition, and creativity.
Whether you're a Cobblemon expert or a Minecraft newbie, this modpack is your gateway to a truly immersive experience.

📥 **Ready to Begin?**
Download Cobblemon Adventures today and start exploring, battling, and building your way through an extraordinary Minecraft journey!
